articles.title: India and Canada reset ties with 'landmark' nuclear energy deal - BBC
articles.description: A host of deals, including one to supply India with uranium, is unveiled as Mark Carney meets Narendra Modi in Delhi.
articles.content: Some in Canada have countered that claim, however, including a Liberal MP from Carney's own party and members of the Sikh diaspora in Canada, who say they believe they continue to be targeted by Indi… [+1 chars]

articles.author: TOI Lifestyle Desk
articles.title: Neanderthal men may have chosen human women more often, reshaping human history: DNA study suggests - The Times of India
articles.description: Ancient history often feels distant and abstract, reduced to fossil fragments and textbook timelines. Yet every so often, a scientific discovery makes.
